summary: 21 cases (15 API + 6 E2E) for the users module are schema-valid, complete, testable, and ready for API/E2E planning. Coverage spans list/get/create/update/delete/reset_password with happy paths, negative paths, validation, auth boundary, and superuser protection. No blockers. Two low-severity informational findings about strengthening assertions on negative-path P2 cases, and two non-blocking advisories about forward references to the Phase 3.5 fact baseline (declared as known unknowns, acceptable per aws-case-design). Workflow may continue to API planning.

findings.message: TC-USER-041 (delete missing user) has only one assertion: '响应表示失败状态'. Could be strengthened by also asserting that no other rows are affected and the response carries an error description.
findings.suggestion: Append assertions: '响应中包含错误描述信息' and '其它已存在用户记录数量保持不变'.

findings.message: TC-USER-052 (reset_password missing user) has only one assertion: '响应表示失败状态'. Could be strengthened by also asserting that no password rotation occurs on existing users.
findings.suggestion: Append assertion: '响应中包含错误描述信息（提及用户不存在或类似语义）'.

findings.message: TC-USER-022 (validation - missing email) does not list 'depends_on_schema' in tags; the assertion checks 'email 字段缺失' which is tightly coupled to UserCreate Pydantic schema and would benefit from explicit tagging for regression filtering.

needs_review.question: TC-USER-050 references '重置后预期固定密码：项目内置约定值（在 fact baseline 中确定）'. The fact baseline (Phase 3.5) will resolve this to '123456' from app/controllers/user.py. Confirm this forward reference is acceptable at case-review time.
needs_review.reason: The reset password fixed value is hardcoded in source (app/controllers/user.py UserController.reset_password) but is intentionally deferred to the Phase 3.5 fact baseline so that test code does not duplicate magic strings. This is by design per aws-case-design.

needs_review.question: TC-USER-103 references '目标角色名称（在 fact baseline 中确定）'. The fact baseline (Phase 3.5) will identify a stable role name (likely the seeded 普通用户/管理员 role) from app/core/init_app.py. Confirm this forward reference is acceptable.
needs_review.reason: Role name is environment-derived (init_app.py seeds roles) and is intentionally deferred to fact baseline so the case stays decoupled from seed data shape changes.
